changes_made: Renamed k8s_apiserver_logging_enabled to k8s_apiserver_audit_logging_enabled for clarity and specificity
review_notes: The functions generally map well to the continuous monitoring control by focusing on audit logging and monitoring changes. However, the function 'k8s_apiserver_logging_enabled' was renamed to 'k8s_apiserver_audit_logging_enabled' to better reflect the focus on audit logging specifically, rather than general logging, which aligns more closely with the continuous monitoring objective.
naming_improvements: Ensure function names specify 'audit' when referring to logging related to monitoring and compliance.
title: Continuous Monitoring - Establishing [ assignment: organization-defined frequencies...
step1_reasoning: The CA-7-b control focuses on continuous monitoring, which in a Kubernetes context can be mapped to ensuring audit logging is enabled and configured for retention, monitoring changes to network policies, and ensuring API server logging is enabled. These checks ensure that any changes or events are logged and can be reviewed, aligning with the continuous monitoring objective.
